subject: [PATCH v3 2/3] fuse: check connection abort during ring creation

2026-06-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a check to ensure that a connection is not aborted while creating a new ring in the fuse_uring_create function. Without this check, a race condition between fuse_uring_create and fuse_chan_abort can lead to unnecessary allocation and teardown of resources, which are eventually cleaned up by fuse_uring_destruct but may linger until process exit even with an aborted connection.
